Generated Narrative: ValueSet microorganism-by-method-vs

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes fromhttp://loinc.org version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where code = 11475-1 (Microorganism identified in Specimen by Culture)
  • Include codes fromhttp://loinc.org version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where code = 92253-4 (Microorganism identified in Isolate or Specimen by Molecular genetics method)
  • Include codes fromhttp://loinc.org version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where code = 76346-6 (Microorganism identified in Isolate by MS.MALDI-TOF)

name: MicroorganismByMethodVS
title: Microorganism by Method
description: LOINC methods used to identify microorganisms.
